entities.name: NAPIER BAJRA HYBRID
entities.description: A forage hybrid (Pennisetum glaucum × P. purpureum) used in intercropping systems

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: A legume (Vigna unguiculata) used in intercropping with NAPIER BAJRA HYBRID

entities.name: TRI-SPECIFIC HYBRID
entities.description: A forage hybrid (P. glaucum × P. purpureum × P. squamulatum) used in intercropping systems

entities.name: CLUSTER BEAN
entities.description: A legume (Cyamopsis tetragonoloba) used in intercropping with TRI-SPECIFIC HYBRID

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: The carbon component of soil organic matter, measured as SOC

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: A key soil nutrient, measured as P

entities.name: INTEGRATED FORAGE-LEGUME CROPPING SYSTEM
entities.description: A system combining forage grasses and legumes to improve land and production

entities.name: LAND DEGRADABILITY
entities.description: The process of land degradation that the cropping system aims to address

entities.name: FORAGE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The amount of forage produced by the cropping system

entities.name: LEGUME EQUIVALENT YIELD
entities.description: A measure of yield in intercropping systems comparing legumes and non-legumes

entities.name: CARBON MINERALIZATION RATES
entities.description: The rate at which soil organic carbon is converted to carbon dioxide

entities.name: SOIL P STATUS
entities.description: The availability and level of phosphorus in the soil

entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The overall condition of the soil to sustain plant growth

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The capacity of the land to produce crops

entities.name: SEMI-ARID REGIONS OF INDIA
entities.description: The geographical area where the study was conducted

entities.name: LONG-TERM SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability of the cropping system to maintain productivity and health over time

entities.name: GRASS-LEGUME-BASED CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems that coalesce diverse crops like grass and legumes

entities.name: MONOCULTURES
entities.description: The cultivation of a single crop species in a given area
